text:
There once was a girl named Lily who loved collecting sea shells. Every weekend she would trek along the shore, gathering shells until her pockets swelled. One day she heard someone say that an old sea lion wore a beautiful shell necklace.

Curious, Lily found the sea lion gnawing on a crab. "What a beautiful necklace you have," she said.

"I wouldn't give it up for anything," said the sea lion with a laugh. "It's sentimental."

"I'll take it," Lily said earnestly. She gently pet the sea lion.

Years went by.

One evening, during a bloom of moons, she lost that necklace beneath barnacles.

She looked everywhere.

With each moonflower, she found a tiny shell brooch with a picture of a sea lion. She treasured them all.

That little sea lion became her guardian angel. Every night it watched over her bed. She named its brooches Luna and Orion. Together they had adventures.
